framework.name: NCSC 10 Steps to Cyber Security
framework.scope: High-level guidance for organisations to protect themselves in cyberspace, covering 10 key areas
framework.structure_description: 10 numbered steps, each with sub-guidance points covering specific actions organisations should take

controls.title: Risk management
controls.description: Take a risk-based approach to securing your data and systems. Embed risk management into your organisational culture. Consider the risks from all sources, including technology, people, and processes.
controls.description_nl: Take a risk-based approach to securing your data and systems. Embed risk management into your organisational culture. Consider the risks from all sources, including technology, people, and processes.
controls.implementation_guidance: Establish a risk management framework. Identify and assess risks to your information assets. Define your risk appetite. Regularly review and update the risk assessment.
controls.verification_guidance: Review risk management policy and risk register. Verify risk assessments are current.

controls.title: Establish a governance structure
controls.description: Establish a governance structure that sets the direction for your approach to risk management. This should be led by senior management and define clear ownership of risks.
controls.description_nl: Establish a governance structure that sets the direction for your approach to risk management. This should be led by senior management and define clear ownership of risks.
controls.implementation_guidance: Assign board-level responsibility for cyber security. Define risk ownership and accountability. Integrate cyber risk into enterprise risk management.

controls.title: Determine your risk appetite
controls.description: Determine your organisation risk appetite. This should reflect the nature and scale of your organisation, the data you handle, and the threats you face.
controls.description_nl: Determine your organisation risk appetite. This should reflect the nature and scale of your organisation, the data you handle, and the threats you face.
controls.implementation_guidance: Define risk appetite statements for different categories of risk. Communicate risk appetite to decision-makers. Review appetite when business context changes.

controls.title: Engagement and training
controls.description: Collaborate with staff on security to produce user-friendly policies that address how people actually work. Security training should be a regular part of your employees working lives.
controls.description_nl: Collaborate with staff on security to produce user-friendly policies that address how people actually work. Security training should be a regular part of your employees working lives.
controls.implementation_guidance: Make security awareness training mandatory for all staff. Tailor training to different roles. Use practical exercises and simulations. Create a positive security culture.
controls.verification_guidance: Review training completion rates. Assess effectiveness through phishing simulations and knowledge tests.

controls.title: Build security awareness
controls.description: Build awareness of cyber security risks across the organisation. Help staff understand how their actions affect security and what they can do to stay safe online.
controls.description_nl: Build awareness of cyber security risks across the organisation. Help staff understand how their actions affect security and what they can do to stay safe online.
controls.implementation_guidance: Run regular awareness campaigns. Cover phishing, password hygiene, reporting incidents, and safe use of removable media.

controls.title: Train staff for their roles
controls.description: Provide specialised training for staff with security-relevant roles, such as system administrators, developers, and incident responders.
controls.description_nl: Provide specialised training for staff with security-relevant roles, such as system administrators, developers, and incident responders.
controls.implementation_guidance: Identify roles requiring specialist security training. Budget for and deliver role-specific training. Track completion and effectiveness.

controls.title: Asset management
controls.description: Know what data and systems you have and what business need they support. Asset management is the foundation for effective cyber security — you cannot protect what you do not know about.
controls.description_nl: Know what data and systems you have and what business need they support. Asset management is the foundation for effective cyber security — you cannot protect what you do not know about.
controls.implementation_guidance: Create and maintain an asset inventory covering hardware, software, data, and cloud services. Assign ownership for each asset. Classify assets by sensitivity and business impact.
controls.verification_guidance: Review asset inventory for completeness. Verify ownership is assigned.

controls.title: Know your assets
controls.description: Identify and document all hardware, software, data, and services that support your organisation. Include cloud services and third-party systems.
controls.description_nl: Identify and document all hardware, software, data, and services that support your organisation. Include cloud services and third-party systems.
controls.implementation_guidance: Use automated discovery tools. Include cloud resources in asset inventory. Update inventory when changes occur.

controls.title: Architecture and configuration
controls.description: Design, build, maintain, and manage systems securely. Reduce the attack surface by removing unnecessary functionality, keeping systems up to date, and applying the principle of least privilege.
controls.description_nl: Design, build, maintain, and manage systems securely. Reduce the attack surface by removing unnecessary functionality, keeping systems up to date, and applying the principle of least privilege.
controls.implementation_guidance: Design systems with security in mind. Apply secure configuration baselines. Implement network segmentation. Remove unnecessary services and software.
controls.verification_guidance: Review architecture diagrams for security. Audit configurations against baselines.

controls.title: Secure by default
controls.description: Apply secure configuration baselines to all systems. Use default-deny rules for network access. Disable unnecessary services and features.
controls.description_nl: Apply secure configuration baselines to all systems. Use default-deny rules for network access. Disable unnecessary services and features.
controls.implementation_guidance: Define and apply hardened configuration baselines (e.g., CIS Benchmarks). Automate configuration checks. Use default-deny firewall rules.

controls.title: Network segmentation
controls.description: Segment your network to limit the blast radius of an attack. Apply access controls between segments based on business need.
controls.description_nl: Segment your network to limit the blast radius of an attack. Apply access controls between segments based on business need.
controls.implementation_guidance: Separate networks by function and trust level. Apply firewall rules between segments. Restrict lateral movement paths.

controls.title: Vulnerability management
controls.description: Keep your systems protected throughout their lifecycle by identifying and fixing known vulnerabilities. Apply security updates and take steps to reduce the risk from unpatched systems.
controls.description_nl: Keep your systems protected throughout their lifecycle by identifying and fixing known vulnerabilities. Apply security updates and take steps to reduce the risk from unpatched systems.
controls.implementation_guidance: Scan for vulnerabilities regularly. Triage and prioritise patches based on risk. Apply critical patches promptly. Plan for end-of-life software replacement.
controls.verification_guidance: Review vulnerability scanning reports. Check patch compliance levels.

controls.title: Patch management
controls.description: Apply security patches and updates in a timely manner. Prioritise critical and high-risk vulnerabilities. Test patches before deployment where possible.
controls.description_nl: Apply security patches and updates in a timely manner. Prioritise critical and high-risk vulnerabilities. Test patches before deployment where possible.
controls.implementation_guidance: Define patching timelines based on severity. Use automated patch deployment tools. Test patches in a staging environment before production deployment.

controls.title: Identity and access management
controls.description: Control who and what can access your systems and data. Use multi-factor authentication, the principle of least privilege, and strong password policies.
controls.description_nl: Control who and what can access your systems and data. Use multi-factor authentication, the principle of least privilege, and strong password policies.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implement multi-factor authentication. Apply least privilege access. Conduct regular access reviews. Remove access promptly when no longer needed.
controls.verification_guidance: Verify MFA deployment. Review access control policies and recent access reviews.

controls.title: Multi-factor authentication
controls.description: Use multi-factor authentication (MFA) to add a layer of protection beyond passwords. Prioritise MFA for privileged accounts, remote access, and cloud services.
controls.description_nl: Use multi-factor authentication (MFA) to add a layer of protection beyond passwords. Prioritise MFA for privileged accounts, remote access, and cloud services.
controls.implementation_guidance: Deploy MFA on all administrative accounts and remote access. Use hardware tokens or authenticator apps rather than SMS where possible.

controls.title: Data security
controls.description: Protect data where it is vulnerable — at rest, in transit, and in use. Understand what data you hold, where it lives, who has access, and the impact of its loss.
controls.description_nl: Protect data where it is vulnerable — at rest, in transit, and in use. Understand what data you hold, where it lives, who has access, and the impact of its loss.
controls.implementation_guidance: Classify data by sensitivity. Encrypt data in transit and at rest. Apply access controls based on classification. Implement data loss prevention where appropriate.
controls.verification_guidance: Review data classification and encryption. Verify access controls match data sensitivity.

controls.title: Data classification
controls.description: Classify data based on its sensitivity and the impact of its unauthorised disclosure, modification, or loss. Apply appropriate protections based on classification.
controls.description_nl: Classify data based on its sensitivity and the impact of its unauthorised disclosure, modification, or loss. Apply appropriate protections based on classification.
controls.implementation_guidance: Define a data classification scheme. Label data according to classification. Apply controls proportionate to classification level.

controls.title: Logging and monitoring
controls.description: Design your systems to be able to detect and investigate incidents. Good logging practices and monitoring tools provide the data needed to identify attacks and respond to them.
controls.description_nl: Design your systems to be able to detect and investigate incidents. Good logging practices and monitoring tools provide the data needed to identify attacks and respond to them.
controls.implementation_guidance: Log security-relevant events across all systems. Centralise log collection. Implement monitoring and alerting for suspicious activity. Define log retention periods.
controls.verification_guidance: Review logging coverage and configuration. Verify monitoring and alerting is active.

controls.title: Centralised logging
controls.description: Collect logs from across your estate into a centralised logging platform. This enables correlation of events and more effective detection and investigation of security incidents.
controls.description_nl: Collect logs from across your estate into a centralised logging platform. This enables correlation of events and more effective detection and investigation of security incidents.
controls.implementation_guidance: Deploy a centralised logging solution (SIEM). Ensure all critical systems forward logs. Protect log integrity.

controls.title: Incident management
controls.description: Plan your response to cyber incidents in advance. A good incident management capability will reduce the impact of an attack, help you recover more quickly, and minimise disruption.
controls.description_nl: Plan your response to cyber incidents in advance. A good incident management capability will reduce the impact of an attack, help you recover more quickly, and minimise disruption.
controls.implementation_guidance: Develop an incident response plan. Define roles, responsibilities, and escalation procedures. Conduct regular exercises. Establish relationships with external support organisations.
controls.verification_guidance: Review incident response plan. Check exercise records and improvement actions.

controls.title: Incident response planning
controls.description: Develop incident response plans covering detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons learned. Ensure plans are tested and kept up to date.
controls.description_nl: Develop incident response plans covering detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and lessons learned. Ensure plans are tested and kept up to date.
controls.implementation_guidance: Document response procedures for common incident types. Include communication plans for stakeholders, regulators, and media. Test plans through exercises.

controls.title: Supply chain security
controls.description: Collaborate with your suppliers and partners to understand and manage the security risks that arise from dependencies on third parties. Supply chain attacks are an increasing threat.
controls.description_nl: Collaborate with your suppliers and partners to understand and manage the security risks that arise from dependencies on third parties. Supply chain attacks are an increasing threat.
controls.implementation_guidance: Identify critical suppliers. Include security requirements in contracts. Conduct supplier due diligence. Monitor supplier security posture over the contract lifecycle.
controls.verification_guidance: Review supplier register. Verify security requirements are in contracts.

controls.title: Supplier due diligence
controls.description: Conduct appropriate due diligence when selecting suppliers, proportionate to the access they will have to your data and systems.
controls.description_nl: Conduct appropriate due diligence when selecting suppliers, proportionate to the access they will have to your data and systems.
controls.implementation_guidance: Define supplier security requirements based on access and risk. Assess supplier security capabilities before contract. Include right-to-audit clauses.
